sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check agent position after clicking black bar
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

print("Charcoal agent (16px):")
for label, seg in [("BEFORE", before), ("AFTER", after)]:
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  {label}: bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check yellow shape next to agent
print("\nYellow shapes:")
for label, seg in [("BEFORE", before), ("AFTER", after)]:
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'Y':
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  {label}: pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check pink bar
print("\nPink bar:")
for label, seg in [("BEFORE", before), ("AFTER", after)]:
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'P':
            print(f"  {label}: pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
